items.title: SoftBank is creating a robotics company that builds data centers — and already eyeing a $100B IPO
items.summary: You need infrastructure to build AI a and robots, but apparently you also need AI and robots to build infrastructure.

items.title: Amazon, Meta join fight to end Google Pay, PhonePe dominance in India
items.summary: PhonePe and Google Pay command 80% of India's UPI instant payments network. Rivals are set to meet with regulators to lobby for restrictions.

items.title: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
items.summary: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.

items.title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
items.summary: The maker of Claude has received multiple pre-emptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.

items.title: On the stand, Elon Musk can’t escape his own tweets
items.summary: Elon Musk took the stand for the second day for his attempt to legally dismantle OpenAI.

items.title: Meta is still burning money on AR/VR
items.summary: Meta is losing billions on Reality Labs each quarter, and its AI expenditures are only going to increase its spending.

items.title: Satya Nadella says he’s ready to ‘exploit’ the new OpenAI deal
items.summary: Microsoft gets to offer OpenAI's tech to its cloud customers and doesn't have to pay for it. "We fully plan to exploit it," Nadella said.

items.title: Microsoft says it has over 20M paid Copilot users, and they really are using it
items.summary: Despite the lingering perception that no one really uses Copilot, Microsoft said on Wednesday that the number of users and engagement is growing.

items.title: Google Cloud surpasses $20B, but says growth was capacity-constrained
items.summary: Google Cloud topped $20B in quarterly revenue for the first time, fueled by surging demand for AI. But capacity constraints mean it could have grown even faster.

items.title: Google gains 25M subscriptions in Q1, driven by YouTube and Google One
items.summary: Google added 25M paid subscriptions in Q1, reaching 350M total, as YouTube and Google One grow.

items.title: Fusion power startup Zap Energy pulls a partial pivot, adding nuclear fission to the mix
items.summary: Surprise! Fusion startup Zap Energy says it will be developing fission reactors alongside its fusion devices.

items.title: Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise
items.summary: The AI agent-tool startup founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal has raised $100 million, led by Sequoia, months after raising a previous $100 million.

items.title: Google Photos uses AI to make the iconic closet from ‘Clueless’ a reality
items.summary: Google says the new feature will leverage AI technology to automatically create a copy of your wardrobe that's based on the pieces of clothing appearing in your Google Photos library.

items.title: More Gemini features are coming to Google TV
items.summary: Google TV just got more Gemini features, including the ability to transform photos and videos with tools Nano Banana and Veo.

items.title: Bill Gurley, Jack Altman back startup Pursuit, which helps companies sell to government
items.summary: On Wednesday, Pursuit announced a $22 million Series A round led by Mike Rosengarten, the co-founder of OpenGov, with big-name VCs participating.

items.title: Roku’s $3 streaming service, Howdy, reaches 1M subs, per recent report
items.summary: Roku’s $2.99 streaming service Howdy has topped 1M subscribers, showing demand for cheaper, low-commitment alternatives to pricier streamers.

items.title: Uber is in the hotel business now, thanks in part to AI
items.summary: Uber announced several new features on Wednesday during its annual event, which push far beyond the company's original ride-hailing purpose and deeper into its users' lives.

items.title: Apple loses bid to pause App Store fee changes as case heads to Supreme Court
items.summary: Apple lost its bid to pause court-ordered App Store payment changes, keeping external purchase links in place as its case with Epic heads toward the Supreme Court.

items.title: Earth AI is vertically integrating the search for critical minerals
items.summary: When Earth AI started hitting months-long delays in its search for critical minerals, it decided to take matters into its own hands.

items.title: Sri Lanka discloses another missing payment, days after hackers stole $2.5M from its finance ministry
items.summary: The government of Sri Lanka has lost more than $3 million in two recent, separate cybersecurity incidents as the country continues to recover from its 2022 debt crisis.
